features.premiumQualityDesc: We offer only the highest standard of vehicles and services to ensure your comfort.
features.bespokeItinerariesDesc: Custom-tailored tours designed to match your unique interests and preferences.
features.safeSecureDesc: Your safety is our priority. All our vehicles are well-maintained and insured.
features.support247Desc: Round-the-clock customer service to assist you at any point during your journey.

hero.desc: We are more than just a travel agency. We are your premium gateway to the wonders of Ceylon, dedicated to crafting unforgettable journeys.

story.subtitle: Our Story
story.title: A Legacy of Excellence in Travel
story.p1: Founded over a decade ago, Ceylone Best Tours started with a simple vision: to showcase the breathtaking beauty of Sri Lanka while providing unparalleled comfort and luxury to every traveler.
story.p2: Today, we stand as a premier travel and transport provider. Our dedicated team of professionals, expert chauffeurs, and a fleet of top-tier vehicles ensure that your journey through our island is nothing short of perfection.

whyChoose.subtitle: The Ceylone Best Tours Difference
whyChoose.title: Why Travel With Us?
whyChoose.desc: We go above and beyond to deliver an extraordinary travel experience, combining authentic local knowledge with international standards of service.

header.desc: Have questions or need assistance? Reach out through any of the channels below.

form.successDescAuth: Thank you for contacting Ceylon Best Tours. We've received your message and will respond within 6 hours. You can check replies in your dashboard.
form.successDescGuest: Thank you for contacting Ceylon Best Tours. We've received your message and will respond within 6 hours. We'll send our response to your email.
form.name: Name *
form.subject: Subject *

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Is insurance included in the quoted price?
faq.a1: Yes, all our tours have foreign passenger insurance included in the price.
faq.q2: Can I pick up the car at the airport?
faq.a2: Absolutely yes! Just let us know your flight details.
faq.q3: What happens if you face an accident while travelling?
faq.a3: After reporting the insurance, if the vehicle is suitable for the journey will continue the tour with the same vehicle. If necessary, the vehicle will be replaced with another same range of the vehicle as soon as possible.
faq.q4: What are the excludes from the quoted price?
faq.a4: You'll need to pay for any services like entrance tickets, food and beverages, accommodation.

info.emergencyDesc: 24/7 roadside assistance for all our customers.

slides.sub: Curated journeys across the pearl of the Indian Ocean.
Ancient temples, misty highlands & sun-drenched shores — curated journeys through Sri Lanka's most iconic destinations.
Tell us your dream — we craft a bespoke itinerary with hidden gems, private experiences & expert local guides.
Premium air-conditioned vehicles and professional drivers ensure you arrive at every destination in comfort.

package.desc: Choose from our expertly crafted itineraries. From the Hill Country mist to the Golden Beaches, our fixed packages offer the best value with a dedicated driver.

custom.desc: Your journey, your rules. Select your favourite stops, your preferred vehicle category, and let us handle the logistics. Freedom is the ultimate luxury.

point.desc: Reliable transfers between any two locations in Sri Lanka. Professional drivers and air-conditioned vehicles waiting just for you.

hero.sub: Discover the soul of Sri Lanka with our curated travel experiences. From misty mountains to golden beaches.

grid.noPackagesSub: Try adjusting your filters to discover more Sri Lanka experiences.

modal.noGuide: No guide is linked to this package.

header.desc: Design your dream Sri Lankan adventure. Select your favorite destinations, thrilling activities, and let us handle the rest.

guestGuard.title: Login Required
guestGuard.desc: You need to be logged in to design and book your own customized Sri Lankan adventure.

success.title: Your Journey Awaits!
success.step1: Our travel experts will review your custom itinerary
success.step2: A personalized price quote will be sent to your profile
success.step3: You'll receive an email notification once reviewed
success.step4: Accept the quote to finalize your dream vacation

review.title: Review Your Plan
review.desc: Almost there! Please verify your travel details before submitting.
review.thoughtsNote: Note: These details will be carefully reviewed by the Ceylon Best Tour team. We will plan the most efficient route and handle all necessary arrangements (hotels, permits, etc.) based on your ideas.
review.subNoticeDesc: By clicking "Submit Booking", your request will be sent to our team for manual review. We will calculate the best possible price based on your route and requirements. No payment is required at this stage.

side.step2Desc: Our team crafts the best price.
side.assistDesc: Let our travel consultants help you build the perfect itinerary.
side.policyDesc: Custom tours require manual quotation. Quotes are typically ready within 24 hours. No upfront payment required to submit.

form.pickStopsDesc: Add cities and landmarks to your personal route.
form.selectUpTo7Dest: Select up to 7 destinations for your route
form.travelDatesDesc: When would you like to start your journey?
form.dreamDesc: Share your thoughts, experiences, or specific ideas for this tour.
form.dreamPlaceholder: E.g. I saw a video about the Nine Arch Bridge and would love to experience it at sunrise... I'm a big fan of Ceylon tea and want to visit a factory...
form.dreamHint: Don't worry about the specifics - just tell us what you're dreaming of!

header.desc: Professional drivers and premium vehicles for seamless transfers across Sri Lanka.

success.title: Booking Submitted!

form.title: Point-to-Point Transfer
form.mainDesc: Reliable one-way transfers between any two locations in Sri Lanka with professional drivers and premium vehicles.

tripStep.locationsDesc: Type to search — use ↑ ↓ to navigate, Enter to select, Esc to close. You can also type a custom location name.
tripStep.dateTimeDesc: Point-to-point is a one-day hire. Select your travel date and preferred pickup time.

reviewStep.title: Review Your Booking
reviewStep.desc: Please review all details before submitting. Our team will respond with a price quote within 24 hours.
reviewStep.nextStep1: Your booking is submitted with status: PENDING
reviewStep.nextStep2: Our team reviews your request within 24 hours
reviewStep.nextStep3: We'll send you a price quote through the system
reviewStep.nextStep4: You accept or reject the quote from your profile
reviewStep.nextStep5: Once accepted, we confirm and assign your vehicle

sidePanel.step1Desc: Fill the form and submit your transfer request.
sidePanel.step2Desc: Our team reviews and sends a price within 24 hours.
sidePanel.step3Desc: Accept the quote and we'll assign your vehicle.
sidePanel.emergencyDesc: 24/7 roadside assistance for all our customers.
sidePanel.paymentDesc: Point-to-Point transfers require a single full payment after the tour ends. No upfront payment required.

passengersStep.title: Passengers
passengersStep.desc: Tell us how many people will be travelling.
passengersStep.babySeatDesc: Tick if any child needs a baby seat
passengersStep.luggageDesc: Enter the number of bags per weight category. This helps us assign the right vehicle.
passengersStep.vehCategoryDesc: Select your preferred vehicle category. Our team will assign the actual vehicle after confirmation.

notesStep.contactDesc: We'll use this to reach you about your booking.
notesStep.prefilled: ✓ Pre-filled from your account — you can edit this
notesStep.weSentOtp: We sent a 6-digit code to <1>{{phone}}</1>. Enter it below.
notesStep.otpNotice: We verify your phone number via a one-time code to ensure our team can reach you. Emergency contact numbers are not verified.
notesStep.emergencyDesc: In case of emergency, who should we contact? This is saved to your profile.
notesStep.notesDesc: Any special requests, preferences, or information for the driver.
notesStep.notesPlaceholder: E.g. early morning pickup, wheelchair access needed, stop at airport first…

hero.desc: Discover the perfect class of vehicle for your lifestyle, from executive luxury to rugged utility.

tabs.clickToSee: Click any category to see vehicles

showcase.miniCarDesc: Perfect for city driving and tight parking spaces. Fuel-efficient and easy to maneuver.
showcase.normalCarDesc: Reliable and comfortable cars perfect for everyday use and small group travel.
showcase.sedanCarDesc: Premium comfort with spacious interiors and elegant design for executive travel.
showcase.mpvDesc: Multi-Purpose Vehicles offering versatility, space, and comfort for groups.
showcase.suvDesc: Powerful and rugged vehicles ideal for adventure trips and off-road exploration.
showcase.miniVanDesc: Compact vans perfect for small groups needing extra space and comfort.
showcase.vanDesc: Spacious vans ideal for medium-sized groups and luggage-heavy trips.
showcase.largeVanDesc: Maximum capacity vans for large groups and extensive cargo transportation.
